## Problem

What user-visible issue does this solve?

## Runtime stage

Which stage changes: detection, overlay, trusted click, image preparation, capture sanitation, clipboard, popup, packaging, or CI?

## Approach

Why is this the smallest safe fix?

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run ci`
- [ ] Safari manual test, when runtime behavior changed
- [ ] Higher-quality mode on/off tested
- [ ] Persistent overlay case tested
- [ ] Performance trace checked for hot-path changes
- [ ] Permissions/privacy reviewed

## Browser evidence

List browsers and versions tested live.
